events.label: reasoning
events.text:
We need answer JSON only. Scenario: aluminum conductors terminated on devices not rated CO/ALR. This is a defect/non-compliance. NEC requires terminals for aluminum must be listed and marked CO/ALR for receptacles/switches, etc. Aluminum on non-CO/ALR device is out of tolerance, fire risk, high/critical. Work stage rough-complete. Component conditions installed-defective, non-compliant. Decision fail. Risk high or critical? Aluminum terminations on wrong devices can cause overheating/fire; critical maybe. But typical risk high. Need choose. Findings: aluminum conductor terminated on device terminal not rated for aluminum/CO/ALR; incompatible materials causing oxidation/loosening, overheating. Actions: remove/replace device with CO/ALR-rated or use approved connector/aluminum-to-copper pigtail with listed connector; verify conductor sizing per Table 310.16. References: NEC 110.3(B), 110.14, 406.2(C) CO/ALR, NEC 310/Table 310.16. Need include value? Not numeric reading. value 0. percent_complete maybe 80. confidence 0.95. event_time 0, rate 0, sound_source "", order [], workable [].

Need ensure JSON valid. No prose outside.

  "findings": [
    "Aluminum conductor is terminated on a device that is not rated CO/ALR.",
    "Incompatible termination can lead to oxidation, high-resistance connections, overheating, and fire.",
    "Device terminal is not listed for aluminum conductor use."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Remove the non-rated device and replace it with a CO/ALR-listed device suitable for aluminum conductors.",
    "Alternatively, install an approved aluminum-to-copper transition pigtail with a listed connector and terminate copper on the device.",
    "Verify conductor ampacity matches Table 310.16 and terminal temperature ratings per NEC 310/110.14."
  ],
  "rationale": "NEC requires terminals and devices used with aluminum conductors to be listed and identified for such use (CO/ALR for wiring devices). A device not rated CO/ALR is out of tolerance and creates a fire hazard.",
  "references": [
    "NEC 110.3(B)",
    "NEC 110.14",
    "NEC 406.2(C)",
    "NEC 310 / Table 310.16"
  ]
}
